title: Delicate Chinese Beef Buddha Jumps Over Wall
description: A kid-friendly Chinese dish featuring garlicky and springy beef in a hot stock, served in a bento box.
instructions: Bring the beef stock to a boil in a large pot.
Add the sliced ginger and minced garlic to the pot and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the sliced beef to the pot and cook for 3 minutes or until browned.
Remove the beef from the pot with a slotted spoon and immediately submerge it in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch.
Add the soy sauce mixture to the pot and cook for 2 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Remove the beef from the ice bath and add it to the pot, stirring to coat with the sauce.
Stir in the chopped scallions and sesame oil.
Serve the beef mixture in a bento box.
